[Limbus Company] [Sous Chef Gregor AU]

Just a sweet chef with his own little bistro. He has always wished to cook for you, a small romantic gesture. After much consideration, he invites you over for a dinner date, offering to show off his culinary skills.

Nothing could go wrong.
